name: Jimmy // Mask kink
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Kinktober day 16

Scrolling on dating apps could be quite boring. All the same kinds of people really… until you found something quite the opposite of the ones you’ve been seeing all day. Just a picture of some guy’s shirtless body in a mirror, his face covered with a ski mask and goggles.

All the information you were given about him was that his name is Jimmy and he’s 28 years old. All he was looking for was someone to hook up with and maybe a potential fuck buddy. Who could deny something like that?

_____________________________

okay well.. I’m clearly not following the schedule anymore! I don’t really care about it anymore and I will just post a bot when I can. Been pretty busy with school things unfortunately and it’s definitely sucking the energy out of me 😭

I’ll keep the schedule in my profile so you know which ones I will do, but when I will do them will be a surprise from now on.. 😀

I might make Jimmy his own full bot later on cause I wanna give him something more 🙏 he deserves some lore and a last name which I will not give now because he’s supposed to be mysterious (totally not because I couldn’t think of last name)

[art credits: @genki_heiki on twt]
creator: Brickyard
